prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 27900→28043→22349→27666→22708，波动较大；2025 年基准约 22708 名，较 2024 年大幅前移约 5000 名，显示当年竞争明显加剧；本省物理类计划 2021 年 24 人、2022 年 25 人、2023 年 23 人、2024 年 23 人、2025 年 27 人；2026 年计划 25 人，较 2025 年减少 2 人，小幅缩招约 7.4%，缩招使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名 2021 年 58→2022 年 48→2023 年 52→2024 年 48→2025 年 48→2026 年 62，近年排名有所下滑，可能略微降低对高分考生的吸引力；该校在声誉舆情、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均未出现显著信号，说明近年报考热度平稳，无明显负面舆情或断档事件影响；石油与天然气工程为传统王牌学科（第四轮 A+），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等学科实力突出，对相关专业考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 石油工程、化工类等传统优势专业热度平稳，计算机、人工智能等新工科专业热度较高；本省物理类考生 2021 年 33.8 万→2026 年 45.6 万，累计增长约 35%，2026 年较 2025 年增加约 3.6%，考生规模持续扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线（本科批）2021 年 432→2025 年 436，波动较小；学校位于北京，对广东考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在广东招生规模较小（25–27 人），招生占比有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 22708、2026 年缩招约 7.4%（使位次前移约 1000 名）、本省物理类考生增加约 3.6%（加剧竞争）、软科排名小幅下滑（略降吸引力）等因素，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 21729 名，区间 21229–22229 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 21729 名，区间 21229–22229 名。建议位次在 21000 名以内的考生可冲刺一档热门专业（人工智能、计算机等）；位次在 21000–22500 名之间的考生以二档专业为主（石油工程、机械类、新能源等），兼顾三档中较热门专业；位次在 22500 名以后的考生以三档专业保底，石油工程等王牌专业仍有较高性价比。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27900→28043→22349→27666→22708, showing significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 22708, a substantial advance of about 5000 places compared to 2024, indicating markedly intensified competition that year; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 24 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 27 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 25, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 7.4%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking was 58 in 2021→48 in 2022→52 in 2023→48 in 2024→48 in 2025→62 in 2026, with a decline in recent years, which may slightly reduce its appeal to high-scoring candidates; the university has not shown significant signals in reputation sentiment, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission files, indicating stable application popularity in recent years without notable negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; petroleum and natural gas engineering is a traditional flagship discipline (A+ in the fourth round), with chemical engineering and technology, geological resources and geological engineering, and other disciplines having strong strengths, providing stable appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Traditional advantageous majors such as petroleum engineering and chemical engineering have stable popularity, while new engineering majors like computer science and artificial intelligence are highly popular; the number of provincial Physics Category candidates increased from 338,000 in 2021 to 456,000 in 2026, a cumulative growth of about 35%, with an increase of about 3.6% from 2025 to 2026, continuously expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 432 in 2021→436 in 2025, with small fluctuations; the university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to Guangdong candidates; its enrollment scale in Guangdong is small (25–27 students), with limited enrollment share.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 22708, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 7.4% (advancing the ranking by about 1000 places), an increase of about 3.6% in provincial Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), and a slight decline in Soft Science ranking (slightly reducing appeal), the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 21729, with a range of 21229–22229.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 21000 can aim for Tier 1 popular majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, etc.); candidates with rankings between 21000 and 22500 should focus on Tier 2 majors (Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, New Energy, etc.), while also considering the more popular majors in Tier 3; candidates with rankings above 22500 should use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, with flagship majors like Petroleum Engineering still offering high cost-effectiveness.
